cleavage agent: tumors from mouse models were incubated in trypsin
fragmentation method: analyzed by LC-MS/MS using a Thermo Orbitrap-Velos mass spectrometer
instrument: analyzed by LC-MS/MS using a Thermo Orbitrap-Velos mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: DTT, to a final concentration of 100 mM
reduction concentration: DTT, to a final concentration of 100 mM
